message.content:
@startuml
participant "Client" as Client

participant "Mobile" as Mobile

participant "SMS Gateway" as SMSGateway

participant "Push Gateway" as PushGateway

participant "DigitalDB" as DigitalDB

participant "Keycloak + Extension" as Keycloak

Client -- Mobile : 1 Enter PhoneNumber, Birthday
Client -- Mobile : 2 Enter Password
Mobile -> Keycloak : 3 POST /auth/signup (PhoneNumber, Birthday)
Keycloak -> DigitalDB : 4 findClientRecord(PhoneNumber, Birthday): ClientRecord
DigitalDB ..> Keycloak : 5 ClientRecord
alt [ClientRecord is NOT found]
Keycloak -> Mobile : 6 HTTP 202
Mobile -> Keycloak : 7 saveInOTPContext(ClientRecord.id)
Keycloak -> Mobile : 8 generateAndSaveOTP(): OTP
Mobile -> Keycloak : 9 HTTP 202
Keycloak -> SMSGateway : 10 sendSMS(phone=PhoneNumber, data=OTP)
SMSGateway -> Mobile : 11 SMS with OTP
Mobile -> Keycloak : 12 getPushToken(): Push Token
PushGateway -> Keycloak : 13 Push Token
Mobile -> Keycloak : 14 generateKeys(): [PublicKey, PrivateKey]
Client -> Mobile : 15 Enter OTP
Mobile -> Keycloak : 16 POST /auth/signup/complete (OTP, Password, Push Token, PublicKey)
Keycloak -> Mobile : 17 validateOTP(OTP)
Mobile -> Keycloak : 18 updateUser(ClientId, KeycloakUserId)
Keycloak -> Mobile : 19
Mobile -> Keycloak : 20 createMobileDevice(ClientId, Push Token, PublicKey)
Keycloak -> Mobile : 21
Mobile -> Keycloak : 22 generateJWT(scope="regular_user"): JWT
Keycloak -> Mobile : 23 HTTP 200 {jwt: JWT}
@enduml
